title: stipa pulcherrima subsp. mediterranea
intro: Stipa pulcherrima subsp. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean feather grass, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stipa pulcherrima subsp. mediterranea include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to aid in digestion and respiratory health.
